notes.0: The heat got to me a bit. My legs felt strong. I didn't notice any knee pain. It was a good base.
notes.1: The air quality hindered a few of my activities, but I was able to make use of treadmills. I felt like I had to exert more effort on the treadmill than I would've outside. It was also very hot in the gym. On my long run I noticed a small flare up in the in knee pain, but I haven't fully started PT. I also had to stop midway through to use the bathroom.
